content.en:
The three Great Saints of the Scorpion Domain Ancestor, the Dark Eagle Domain Ancestor, and the Evil Wind Domain Ancestor had fallen, and their parents immediately knew about it.

At this moment, the three evil clans of the Dark Destruction Domain were furious.

Through deduction, they all knew that the domain ancestors who had been sent into the Dark Soul Domain had all fallen, and almost none of them had played any role, so they fell and died.

This is a huge loss!

Moreover, the loss of three Saints was almost unbearable for them.

What's more, all the clansmen they sent have fallen, which is equivalent to a complete failure, and the benefits of the Dark Soul Domain have nothing to do with them.

A trillion years later, it was their turn to enter the Dark Soul Domain.

And during this time, they can't get any benefits from the Dark Soul Domain, which is the real loss.

......

After Ye Tian destroyed the three evil clan domain ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain, he continued to consolidate the territory of the human race.

As soon as a precious treasure is born somewhere, he goes to snatch it.

In this way, the long years passed slowly, and under the leadership of Ye Tian, the human race developed more and more in the Dark Soul Domain, and snatched many treasures, some of which were even useful to the Superior Domain Ancestor.

Some of these treasures obtained by the Terrans were used for themselves, and some of them were taken out of the Dark Soul Domain and sent to the Terran headquarters in the Xuanxu Sacred Realm.

It can be said that with the resources of the Dark Soul Domain, the strength of the human race has developed very quickly.

In the blink of an eye, tens of billions of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's copy body in the Dark Soul Domain had already grown to the Invincible Soul Ancestor realm, and had reached the peak realm of the Invincible Soul Ancestor.

The promotion of the Invincible Soul Ancestor to the Supreme Soul Ancestor has also been deduced at present.

The promotion of the Invincible Domain Ancestor to the Supreme Domain Ancestor is to master the physical body, and after completing the nine transformations, he has entered the Supreme Domain Ancestor realm, and the Invincible Soul Ancestor is similar.

The invincible soul ancestor is to control the soul, and after controlling 365 times the soul power, he will go through nine soul transformations, and at that time, he can step into the realm of the unsurpassed soul ancestor.

At present, there are many strong people in the Dark Soul Domain who have reached the invincible Soul Ancestor, most of them are native Soul Ancestors, because the Native Soul Ancestors are loved by luck and practice very smoothly, while outsiders are suppressed to a certain extent.

Ye Tian's copied body had also cultivated to the peak realm of the Invincible Soul Ancestor, and was beginning to control the soul.

Although controlling the soul is not the same as controlling the physical body, Ye Tian's realm is too high after all, coupled with the occasional use of the derivation characteristic, consuming a little bit of the power of the Holy Soul to deduce how to control the soul, this has little impact on the body.

Therefore, Ye Tian's speed of controlling his soul was many times faster than that of other invincible soul ancestors.

Although within a trillion years, no superior domain ancestors could enter, and the ancestors could not enter.

However, Ye Tian wanted to raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the Supreme Soul Ancestor within a trillion years.

In this way, even if other Peerless Domain Ancestors entered the Dark Soul Domain, they still had no way to resist him.

Moreover, Ye Tian knew that in a trillion years, the Dark Soul Domain would give birth to a shocking opportunity, and that time was also the time when the competition was fiercest.

Now, the Dark Soul Domain has been preliminarily born, and the treasures born are of limited grade.

100 million years, 100 million years, so it passed.

At the time of the 70 billion years, Ye Tian finally completed the nine soul transformations and stepped into the realm of the Peerless Soul Ancestor.

Bang!!!!!

Endless soul energy poured into the Ten Directions Saint Realm from the Dark Soul Realm, and was absorbed and refined by Ye Tian.

The movement of his breakthrough was too great, so it attracted the attention of many strong people, even the ancestors noticed the movement of Ye Tian's breakthrough.

"The Dark Soul Domain Ancestor gave birth to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, such a fast speed, who is it?"

The ancestors were curious.

Soon, they knew.

"Terran, Aoba Soul Ancestor, it's him!"

The Ancestors were stunned.

In order to cultivate the invincible soul ancestors, they even took out some treasures themselves, but the way of the soul ancestors was an unfamiliar path after all, and it was difficult for them to quickly help the soul ancestors to be promoted to the superior soul ancestors.

But even so, with their resources and guidance, they are not a soul ancestor of the human race.

What is the Terran? It's just a Superior Domain Ancestor, and to them, this force is simply an ant.

But it is such a small force that has cultivated a terrifying genius that neither their juniors nor their disciples can climb.

After Ye Tian's copied body entered the Peerless Domain Ancestor, he no longer cared about everything.

As the Qingye Soul Ancestor, Ye Tian began to sweep everything, stepping into the headquarters of one force after another, snatching all their resources, even the stations of the Destruction Saint Clan and the Dark Sacred Domain's Holy Gates, they were also taken care of by him.

Of course, he won't kill everything indiscriminately, after all, the headquarters of the human race and the ontology are in the outside world, so naturally he can't offend these ancestors too much.

Therefore, Ye Tian only robbed resources and did not kill people.

In this way, many resources of the Dark Sanctuary were gathered into the hands of the Terrans, and many treasured lands were also occupied by the Terrans.

Many forces united and wanted to confront Ye Tian, but they still couldn't defeat Ye Tian.

----------------

"Forget it, after a trillion years of the birth of the Dark Soul Domain, it is the real battlefield, and the treasures born at that time are really precious, what if these resources are given to the human race?

The Ancestors thought to themselves.

The ancestors gave up this period of competition, so in this era, the Dark Souls Domain was dominated by the human race.

Gathering the resources of the Dark Soul Domain, Ye Tian cultivated all the Soul Ancestors of the Human Race to the Invincible Soul Ancestor realm.

However, it was still very difficult for them to be promoted to a peerless Soul Ancestor.

However, with his guidance and preaching, when a trillion years are reached, the human race should have the hope of giving birth to several peerless soul ancestors.

And Ye Tian, the copy body, was also working hard as a cultivator, refining countless resources, just for himself to be able to raise his strength to the peak realm of the Supreme Soul Ancestor.

But this step is not easy.

"Time is not enough, a trillion years is indeed not a long time, and during this time period, there is no way for the Dark Soul Domain to be born for the Supreme Soul Ancestor to cultivate into a resource for rapid progress, and the Silent Destruction Treasure in the main body has also been refined, without more Silent Destruction Treasures, there is no way to quickly improve the cultivation!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After thinking about it, Ye Tian only thought of one way.

"The Silence Annihilation has been destroyed, but strictly speaking, I am also a Silence Clan, after all, I have all the ancestral endowments of the Silence Clan, because if I want, I can also create a Silence Time and Space Region!"

Ye Tian thought suddenly.
